arts.ttl: Champions League | Leipzig v Juventus: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Juventus prepares for their crucial Champions League clash against RB Leipzig on Wednesday night, manager Thiago Motta is expected to maintain a relatively consistent lineup. However, a few key changes could be in store for the Bianconeri. Federico Gatti is poised to make his return to the back four after being absent from recent Serie A matches against Genoa and Napoli. Reports suggest that Pierre Kalulu will get the nod at right-back, while the reliable Bremer is set to occupy his usual position in central defense.
